name: Red Heart
desc: A classic red heart emoji, used for expressions of love and romance.

name: Orange Heart
desc: An orange heart, often representing warmth, care, or friendship.

name: Yellow Heart
desc: A yellow heart symbol, commonly associated with happiness and trust.

name: Green Heart
desc: A green heart, often used to signify nature, health, or envy.

name: Blue Heart
desc: A blue heart, representing stability, peace, or deep platonic love.

name: Purple Heart
desc: A purple heart, used for luxury, spiritual love, or compassion.

name: Black Heart
desc: A black heart, used for dark humor, sorrow, or alternative styles.

name: White Heart
desc: A white heart, symbolizing purity, peace, or condolence.

name: Brown Heart
desc: A brown heart, representing earthiness, reliability, or warmth.

name: Broken Heart
desc: A red heart split in two, representing heartbreak or loss.

name: Heart Exclamation
desc: A heart used as the top part of an exclamation mark.

name: Two Hearts
desc: Two pink hearts orbiting, representing love being in the air.

name: Revolving Hearts
desc: Two hearts circling each other, indicating deep affection.

name: Beating Heart
desc: A heart with vibration lines, symbolizing a heart racing with love.

name: Growing Heart
desc: Multiple heart outlines stacked, showing love increasing in size.

name: Sparkling Heart
desc: A pink heart with glints, representing new or special love.

name: Heart with Arrow
desc: A heart pierced by Cupid’s arrow, indicating falling in love.

name: Heart with Ribbon
desc: A heart wrapped like a gift, representing the gift of love.

name: Heart Decoration
desc: A heart-shaped cutout within a square, used for aesthetic posts.

name: Peace Symbol
desc: A circle with three lines, globally recognized for peace and anti-war.

name: Latin Cross
desc: The primary symbol of Christianity, representing the cross of Christ.

name: Star and Crescent
desc: A symbol representing Islam, often found on national flags.

name: Om
desc: A sacred sound and spiritual symbol in Hinduism and Buddhism.

name: Wheel of Dharma
desc: A symbol representing the Eightfold Path in Buddhism.

name: Star of David
desc: A hexagram symbol representing Judaism and Jewish identity.

name: Dotted Six-Pointed Star
desc: A star with a dot in the center, used in various mystical contexts.

name: Menorah
desc: A nine-branched candelabrum used during Hanukkah.

name: Yin Yang
desc: A symbol of balance between opposing forces in Chinese philosophy.

name: Orthodox Cross
desc: A cross with three horizontal crossbeams used in Eastern Orthodoxy.

name: Place of Worship
desc: A silhouette of a person kneeling, indicating a religious site.

name: Ophiuchus
desc: The 13th zodiac sign, represented by the Serpent Bearer.

name: Aries
desc: The first zodiac sign, representing the Ram (March 21 – April 19).

name: Taurus
desc: The second zodiac sign, representing the Bull (April 20 – May 20).

name: Gemini
desc: The third zodiac sign, representing the Twins (May 21 – June 20).

name: Cancer
desc: The fourth zodiac sign, representing the Crab (June 21 – July 22).

name: Leo
desc: The fifth zodiac sign, representing the Lion (July 23 – August 22).

name: Virgo
desc: The sixth zodiac sign, representing the Maiden (August 23 – Sept 22).

name: Libra
desc: The seventh zodiac sign, representing the Scales (Sept 23 – Oct 22).

name: Scorpio
desc: The eighth zodiac sign, representing the Scorpion (Oct 23 – Nov 21).

name: Sagittarius
desc: The ninth zodiac sign, representing the Archer (Nov 22 – Dec 21).

name: Capricorn
desc: The tenth zodiac sign, representing the Sea-Goat (Dec 22 – Jan 19).

name: Aquarius
desc: The eleventh zodiac sign, representing the Water Bearer (Jan 20 – Feb 18).

name: Pisces
desc: The twelfth zodiac sign, representing the Fish (Feb 19 – March 20).

name: ID Button

desc: Indicates that people are not allowed to walk here.

desc: Used to denote age-restricted content or locations.

name: Radioactive
desc: A warning symbol for radiation hazards.

desc: A cardinal direction arrow pointing east.

desc: Used for physics and atomic theory.

name: Leo Sign
desc: Fire sign ruled by the Sun.

name: Fast-Forward Button

name: Play or Pause Button
desc: A combined symbol for alternating media states.

name: Fast Reverse Button
desc: Two left-pointing triangles for skipping back.

name: Last Track Button
desc: A triangle and vertical bar for restarting a track.

name: Pause Button
desc: Two vertical bars used to stop media temporarily.

name: Stop Button
desc: A solid square used to end media playback.

name: Record Button
desc: A solid circle used for starting a recording.

name: Eject Button
desc: A triangle over a horizontal bar used to remove media.

name: Cinema
desc: A camera symbol in a square, used for theaters.

name: Dim Button

name: Bright Button

name: Vibration Mode

name: Minus Sign
